children.heading: ACDA
children.label: 1 ACDA
children.text: The term “ACDA” means the United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency.

children.heading: AID
children.label: 2 AID
children.text: The term “AID” means the United States Agency for International Development.

children.heading: Agency; Federal agency
children.label: 3 Agency; Federal agency
children.text: The term “agency” or “Federal agency” means an Executive agency as defined in .section 105 of title 5

children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 4 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on International Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate.

children.heading: Covered agency
children.label: 5 Covered agency
children.text: The term “covered agency” means any of the following agencies: ACDA, USIA, IDCA, and AID.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 6 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of State.

children.heading: Function
children.label: 7 Function
children.text: The term “function” means any duty, obligation, power, authority, responsibility, right, privilege, activity, or program.

children.heading: IDCA
children.label: 8 IDCA
children.text: The term “IDCA” means the United States International Development Cooperation Agency.

children.heading: Office
children.label: 9 Office
children.text: The term “office” includes any office, administration, agency, institute, unit, organizational entity, or component thereof.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 10 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of State.

children.heading: USIA
children.label: 11 USIA
children.text: The term “USIA” means the United States Information Agency.
